channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Alitan sa parking sa Intramuros, nauwi sa pisikalan ng e-trike driver at guwardiya
item.description: Nagkaroon ng komprontasyon na nauwi sa pisikalan sa pagitan ng isang e-trike driver at isang guwardiya o tinukoy bilang 'guardia civil' sa loob ng Intramuros, Maynila. Ayon sa ulat, nagsimula ang insi...

item.title: Fort St. John bull rider Jake Gardner takes top spot in PRCA world standings after RodeoHouston win
item.description: Jake Gardner, a bull rider with roots in Fort St. John, British Columbia, has risen to the number one position in the Professional Rodeo Cowboys Association (PRCA) world standings for bull riding. The...

item.title: Counter-terrorism police investigate arson attack on former Jewish charity premises in northwest London
item.description: Counter Terrorism Policing London is leading the investigation into an arson attack that occurred on a business premises in Hendon, northwest London, on Friday night. The building was previously occup...

item.title: Weighing up the financial and lifestyle trade-offs of owning versus renting a coastal property
item.description: This advice column explores whether it makes more financial and lifestyle sense to build a coastal home or simply rent one when needed. The reader, who owns both an inner-city home and a debt-free blo...

item.title: KMPDU Highlights Security Risks, Severe Staffing Shortages and Infrastructure Woes at Ishiara Level IV Hospital in Embu
item.description: The Kenya Medical Practitioners, Pharmacists and Dentists’ Union (KMPDU) has come out strongly to address serious challenges facing Ishiara Level IV Hospital in Embu County. In a recent statement, the...

item.title: Nigerian Doctor Ronami Ogbomade Sampson Dies in ICU After Collapsing at Warri Hospital
item.description: A family in Nigeria is mourning the sudden loss of their loved one, Dr Ronami Ogbomade Sampson, fondly known as Rosam. The young doctor, who was a House Officer in the Paediatrics Department at Centra...

item.title: Eight Oil and Gas Tankers Cross Strait of Hormuz After Iran Brief Reopening Announcement During Ceasefire
item.description: My people, at least eight oil and gas tankers don cross the Strait of Hormuz early on Saturday morning after Iran announce say dem dey briefly reopen the crucial waterway on Friday afternoon during th...

item.title: Netflix posts strong Q1 earnings on subscriber growth and pricing, but Q2 outlook weighs on shares
item.description: Netflix reported first‑quarter 2026 results that significantly exceeded analyst expectations, showcasing the resilience of its subscription‑based streaming business. The company recorded earnings per ...

item.title: Coventry City Secures Premier League Promotion After Draw With Blackburn
item.description: Coventry City has secured promotion to the Premier League, ending a 25-year absence from England’s top flight. The decisive moment came after the team earned the crucial point they needed in a match a...

item.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs: Full Bracket, First-Round Matchups, Schedule and TV Details
item.description: The 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs are set to begin on Saturday, April 18, with all 16 teams confirmed after the final day of the regular season. In the Eastern Conference, the Buffalo Sabres (No. 1 At...

item.title: Sparkling water has minimal effect on glucose metabolism and is not a meaningful aid for weight loss
item.description: A brief analysis published in BMJ Nutrition, Prevention & Health examines whether sparkling or carbonated water can support weight management by influencing blood sugar and energy processing. The auth...

item.title: New iOS App Gigs Uses On-Device AI to Build Personal Concert Archives
item.description: Gigs, a new iOS app developed by indie creator Hidde van der Ploeg, aims to help live music fans organize and preserve their concert experiences. Launched this week, the app allows users to build a co...

item.title: ESA's Rosalind Franklin Rover Secures Falcon Heavy Launch to Mars in Late 2028 via NASA Partnership
item.description: The European Space Agency's long-delayed Rosalind Franklin rover mission has finally found a path forward after years of setbacks. Originally planned under the ExoMars program with Russian cooperation...

item.title: US lawmakers and regulators increase oversight of prediction markets over insider trading concerns
item.description: Washington is ramping up its review of prediction markets, online platforms where users bet on real-world events ranging from sports outcomes to geopolitical developments. The scrutiny follows several...

item.title: Parliament Holds Special Session to Discuss Women's Reservation and Delimitation Bill
item.description: Today marks the beginning of a special session of the Indian Parliament, where crucial legislative matters will be discussed. Key among them are the Women Reservation Bill and the Delimitation Bill. T...

item.title: Five Grade School Pupils Drown in Rainwater Pond in Marawi City
item.description: Five grade school pupils from Maranao families tragically drowned while swimming in a stagnant rainwater pond in Barangay Panoroganan, Marawi City on April 16, 2026. The victims, identified as Rania D...

item.title: Marsabit locals file class action suit against BP and Kenyan government over 1980s oil exploration pollution
item.description: Nearly 300 residents from Marsabit County have come together in a big class action case at the Environmental and Land Court. They are suing the British oil giant BP and the Kenyan government over seri...

item.title: IMF Conflict of Interest in Preferred Creditor Status for African Multilateral Banks
item.description: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) holds preferred creditor status which gives it priority in debt repayments during borrower difficulties. This status helps keep its funding costs low with no non-...

item.title: Mugabe and Co-Accused Return to Court Over Hyde Park Shooting
item.description: The case involving Bellarmine Mugabe and his co-accused, Tobias Matonhodze, has resumed at the Alexandra Magistrates Court. Both men face serious charges, including defeating the ends of justice, poss...
